headline: APD to Build New ASU in Florida to Support Space Launch Industry
summary: APD plans a new Florida air separation unit by 2028 to supply space launches and regional industries with oxygen, nitrogen and argon.

headline: Air Products to Build, Own and Operate New Air Separation Unit in Florida
summary: LEHIGH VALLEY, Pa. - Air Products , a world-leading industrial gas supplier, today announced plans to build, own and operate a new air separation unit in the City of Cocoa, Florida. The ASU will...
